decisions.briefing: Markets dipped mildly today with NASDAQ -0.6% and S&P 500 -0.3%, a neutral session with no strong directional catalyst. Cash sits at $477.14 — just below the $500 threshold that would trigger a new buy, so no new positions are opened. All six existing holdings remain healthy with none near the -7% stop-loss level.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities pulled back modestly on Monday, with the NASDAQ leading losses at -0.6% amid continued uncertainty around Federal Reserve rate policy and mixed signals from the technology sector. The S&P 500 shed -0.3% in a low-conviction session, as investors digested recent economic data without a clear directional catalyst. Breadth was mixed, with defensive sectors holding better than growth names.
market_education.summary_zh: 美股週一小幅回落，那斯達克指數跌0.6%，主要受科技板塊拖累，市場對聯準會利率走向仍存在不確定性。標普500指數下跌0.3%，整體交投清淡，投資者在缺乏明確催化劑的情況下消化近期經濟數據。類防禦股表現相對抗跌，成長型個股則承壓較重。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: RSI (Relative Strength Index) measures how quickly a stock's price has moved recently on a scale of 0–100. When RSI exceeds 70, the stock is considered 'overbought,' meaning it may have risen too far too fast and could be due for a pullback. Today's screener showed many otherwise attractive stocks — MRNA (85.9), SSRM (84.0), CYTK (82.6) — with extreme overbought readings, which is why they scored lower despite bullish MACD signals.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 相對強弱指數（RSI）衡量股價近期漲跌速度，數值介於0至100之間。當RSI超過70，代表股票處於「超買」狀態，意味著短期漲幅可能過大，存在回調風險。今日選股名單中，MRNA（85.9）、SSRM（84.0）、CYTK（82.6）等股票RSI均達極端高位，即使MACD走勢仍偏多，整體評分仍因此被下調，反映動能雖強但需警惕過熱風險。
